title: polyscias humbertiana
intro: Polyscias humbertiana, also known as the Humbert's Polyscias or Pua, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polyscias humbertiana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
